Thus the Eastern Hemisphere people select their own and
carve their own future; on the other hand the Western Hemi
sphere people take whatever is served to them.
Next let us see a third direction. In Queen Victoria's horo
scope all the planets are arranged fi:um the eighth house to
the Ascendant or they are in the southern hemisphere exclu
sively. This Queen was purely selfless. She was objective and
impersonal. She was occupied chiefly with practical, concrete
and visible things. Such too was the age in which she lived.
Outward respectability was prized high. These are the fea
tures of this southern hemisphere.
Martin Luther provides a contrast, for his planets are
ranged between the second and the sixth houses. They are in
the Northern hemisphere. Here life is purely subjective, spiri
tual. One is occupied with invisible affairs. Superficial reli
gion, outward pomp and show, meaningless extravagance and
vanity all these are vehemently opposed. Such is the life of
Mrs.
